changeSet.author: pdp

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE pdp_domain_package_migration MODIFY id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY source_version_id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY target_version_id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY preview_id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY failure_details LONGTEXT NULL, MODIFY rollback_plan LONGTEXT NOT NULL, MODIFY created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE pdp_domain_package_snapshot MODIFY id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY package_version_id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY layer_chain LONGTEXT NOT NULL, MODIFY snapshot LONGTEXT NOT NULL, MODIFY created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE pdp_package_override MODIFY id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY version_id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY old_value LONGTEXT NULL, MODIFY new_value LONGTEXT NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE pdp_behavior_definition MODIFY id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY version_id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY definition LONGTEXT NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE pdp_page_definition MODIFY id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY version_id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY definition LONGTEXT NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE pdp_relation_definition MODIFY id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY object_definition_id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY definition LONGTEXT NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE pdp_field_definition MODIFY id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY object_definition_id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY definition LONGTEXT NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE pdp_object_definition MODIFY id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY version_id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY definition LONGTEXT NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE pdp_domain_package_version MODIFY id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY package_id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY manifest LONGTEXT NOT NULL, MODIFY created_by CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY reviewed_by CHAR(36) NULL, MODIFY approved_by CHAR(36) NULL, MODIFY created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE pdp_domain_package MODIFY id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY workspace_id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY parent_package_id CHAR(36) NULL; ALTER TABLE pdp_core_field_catalog MODIFY id CHAR(36) NOT NULL, MODIFY aliases LONGTEXT NOT NULL;
